shapes.name: Page subtitle
shapes.text: Choose how AppLocker protects your session and confirms it is you.

shapes.name: Boot label
shapes.text: Start enforcement when I sign in

shapes.name: Face description
shapes.text: Unlock the lock screen and terminal sudo prompts with your face.

shapes.name: Authentication description
shapes.text: Keep at least one fallback enabled so a camera problem cannot lock you out.

shapes.name: Enrolled faces summary
shapes.text: 3 enrolled faces — manage them with the ⚙ button above.

shapes.name: Page subtitle
shapes.text: Choose how AppLocker protects your session and confirms it is you.

shapes.name: Boot label
shapes.text: Start enforcement when I sign in

shapes.name: Face description
shapes.text: Unlock the lock screen and terminal sudo prompts with your face.

shapes.name: Authentication description
shapes.text: Keep at least one fallback enabled so a camera problem cannot lock you out.

shapes.name: Enrolled faces summary
shapes.text: 3 enrolled faces — manage them with the ⚙ button above.

shapes.name: Capture hint
shapes.text: Move slowly — we capture a few angles for a reliable match.

shapes.name: Name hint
shapes.text: Give this face a short name so you can recognise it later.

shapes.name: Page subtitle
shapes.text: One switch for the feature, per-app list behind the gear.

shapes.name: Page subtitle
shapes.text: Keep a protected folder, and hide files from the file manager.

shapes.name: Hidden files description
shapes.text: Hides items from the file manager only — nothing is encrypted.

shapes.name: Page subtitle
shapes.text: Lock the session automatically when you step away.

shapes.name: Watcher description
shapes.text: The camera stays off while you work. When idle it takes a quick photo now and then; if you're gone it locks the session. Any face counts — it never checks who you are.

shapes.name: Power label
shapes.text: Only when plugged in (pause on battery)

shapes.name: Fallback hint
shapes.text: After 3 failed attempts you can enter your PIN or password.

shapes.name: Fallback message
shapes.text: Face not recognised. Enter your PIN or password.

shapes.name: Hidden summary
shapes.text: Nothing hidden yet — add items with the ⚙ button above.

shapes.name: Hidden dialog description
shapes.text: Hidden while locked, back when AppLocker sees your face.

shapes.name: Reveal hint
shapes.text: ✕ reveals an item for good and stops managing it.

shapes.name: Autocomplete hint
shapes.text: Applies to the lock screen and terminal password prompts.

shapes.name: Row hint
shapes.text: Turn the PIN on or off — use ⚙ to set or change it.

shapes.name: Row hint
shapes.text: Accepts your account password as a fallback.

shapes.name: Row hint
shapes.text: Turn the PIN on or off — use ⚙ to set or change it.

shapes.name: Row hint
shapes.text: Accepts your account password as a fallback.

shapes.name: Re-ask hint
shapes.text: Applies to every locked app at once.

shapes.name: Lock apps description
shapes.text: Locked apps ask for your face or PIN before they open.

shapes.name: Locked apps summary
shapes.text: 3 locked apps — manage them with the ⚙ button above.
